entity.summary: Monad-native decentralized exchange offering a custom dynamic liquidity market maker for spot trading together with perpetual-market products and liquidity vaults.
entity.notes: HEI uses the Monad public-mainnet date as the canonical production launch marker. A public beta existed before mainnet, but the entity is dated from production network availability. Spot, perpetual, and vault products remain one exchange entity.

events.title: Bean Exchange launched on Monad mainnet
events.description: Bean Exchange entered production operation on Monad with spot DLMM and related trading products.
events.notes: The event uses Monad's exact public-mainnet date; current Bean documentation and application confirm the production exchange identity.

evidence.title: Monad documentation
evidence.notes: Official network documentation records the public mainnet launch on November 24, 2025.

evidence.title: Bean Exchange overview
evidence.notes: Current first-party documentation describes the production spot, perpetual, and vault products on Monad.

evidence.title: Bean Exchange DLMM
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies the custom DLMM architecture used for spot trading on Monad.

evidence.title: Bean Exchange application
evidence.notes: The official exchange application remains reachable.

evidence.title: Bean Exchange protocol metrics
evidence.notes: Current independent metrics report non-zero Monad TVL, fees, revenue, and DEX volume.
